data.content: Shipment complete. Fast-forwarded local main from c2f40d10 to 5761392ea2376a7799f21d5e15bbe85c954e042d, pushed HEAD:main to origin, and verified origin/main now points at the shipped commit. GitHub Actions for that SHA passed: CI run 25318046898 and Coverage Badge run 25318046688. CI reported coverage-regression annotations as warnings, but the workflow conclusion was success.
